raw_consumer_statement: American Express continues to rebill a merchant with a fraudulent transaction. The merchant has not delivered product which has been repeatedly shown and keep getting awarded a rebill of funds. This entire transaction is legally in favor of me the card holder. There was a clear quid pro quo ( another illegal action ) that happened and have been within my rights as a consumer in CA. all transactions are under question now as the cc company can not/ will not protect me from fraudulent transactions. They cc company refused to return annual fee once membership and trust had been compromised.
